name: io.github.ayhammouda/gsc-seo-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Google Search Console SEO data over stdio.
title: GSC SEO MCP

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID for Search Console API access.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client secret for Search Console API access.

environmentVariables.name: GSC_SEO_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to false only when enabling sitemap submission.
